caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and a tall, grey, stylized wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in the foreground. The background is a cluttered room with walls covered in framed photographs and clothing racks displaying apparel. A logo is visible on the left, featuring a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST STUDIO," while another logo on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, his head shifting slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing as he speaks. The environment and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
